The tournament is a 3-day invitational event with a prize pool of ₹ 2,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=Ocean|b1link=Ocean (Caster) |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in }} ===Format=== '''OR Invitational Championship Legends Rise - 2021:''''' August 20th - 222nd, 2021'' * ''16 Teams '' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''10 Matches to be played over a period of 3 days .'' * ''3 Matches to be played for the first two days and 4 matches to be played on the final day .'' ====Matchdays==== * ''3 Matchdays: 3 Matches for 2 days and 4 Matches on the final Day.'' ** '''''Friday''''': ''(E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''Saturday''''': ''(E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''Sunday''''':
